{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324113958B4D57129690E6A68DFBA"}"},"total":662},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595625946249036606","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好爽吼吼吼吼，这是我看过最爽的高武，苍龙破阵，涤荡九州 以血为誓，永镇山河 铁甲不灭，护我国疆 此身可碎，此魂永镇！ 完全没有任何毒点，包你一打开直接看到底！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768499640,"group_id":"7468569650779917336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/ufbQDSkGtOp7i91a7Qz+9n/6UAB4p5jGE7HmB+fQs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b2d6353f00e445d8fa88015af79ee89~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883055&x-signature=0TqqA%2Bev7ngWM6idvnt%2BfyS3uig%3D","user_id":"1669495957754155","user_name":"无情的羊羊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1669495957754155","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7468569650779917336","book_info":{"abstract":"【高武+爽文+一路碾压+超快节奏+无女主】
【主角轻微暴躁症】【正常完结，短篇精品，放心观看】
武道世界，武魂觉醒。
“对方是武道宗师，颇有大家风范，你应当以礼待之......卧槽你怎么让他给你磕一个？”
“此女是公认的天骄，实力不俗....等等，你怎么给她骂破防了？”
“对手是高品武者，我们先避其锋芒.....不是，你怎么给他腿打断了？”
多年以后，有记者发问。
“江昊先生，请问您是如何让一众天骄甘愿屈服的呢？”
江昊正了正神色，“因为我品德高尚。”
“可...我听说他们一个个鼻青脸肿，崩溃痛哭又是怎么回事呢？”
“说了，是靠我的品德。”
“那我想问一下...”
“问问问，问个毛你问，再问我让你飞起来！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ca478059912e65fa23132a385261f282","author":"万能小黑君","author_id":"","book_id":"7468569650779917336","book_name":"手搓灭世级冰龙，天骄直呼他开了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7468569655288807960","read_count":"22391","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"487763"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"212","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,都市异能,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1468ae325d8f5ac5b9febc6317cbea4a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507598&x-signature=EOXV4i5aPNXxUY%2FtlCbz7Mwt9AA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3048314816707933","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"259"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324113958B4D57129690E6A68DFBA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22032,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1088},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579644650477617982","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"5星！5星！必须5星！主角性格挺有特点的，但没有那种不适感，之前看了那么多男频文不论好的坏的或多或少都有雷点，毕竟想看爽文就只有男频对味了[捂脸]之前都是忍着不适忽略雷点看那些文的，就这一本看到现在没有一个雷点[雀食神作]！！！我一个女生看到对胃口的男频文真的太不容易了[哭]求大大一定不要改文风！！大大加油[送心]！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764776607,"group_id":"7468569650779917336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🌸爱看男频无女主和耽美的乐子人一枚~🌸","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0LQPw20CVlzj5mbRVQ4Z9U=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a220dfc142d34baaa8f629d41ab16ec9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873650&x-signature=FhnFfDO%2FjjAPo2XAOa2SnB2Ae9g%3D","user_id":"559031693613364","user_name":"千秋血灼华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"559031693613364","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7468569650779917336","book_info":{"abstract":"【高武+爽文+一路碾压+超快节奏+无女主】
